steps.t: You must hurry to the eastern gate of Umbar Baharbêl and warn the guardsmen there of the approaching danger.
The guardsman would not listen. You should hurry to the Waterway Market and <rgb=#00FF00>beckon</rgb> for the folk by the pool to heed you…
The folk near the Waterway Market must be warned of the approaching danger!
Phârex stands at attention, worried by the tidings you have brought to his city.
Daxamat stands by the fountain, a worried expression upon his face.
According to his brother, you will find Jajax at the forum of Bith Gabâr.
<rgb=#00FF00>Daxamat's Refuge is just west of the Waterway Market in Umbar Baharbêl, behind an unassuming door.</rgb> Itûr has given you a…
